reviews.title: Never go there
reviews.positives: Nothing, only the cookie.
reviews.negatives:
Extremely Disappointing Stay at DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Penang

My stay at DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Penang was deeply disappointing and frustrating from the beginning. I had to request to change rooms three times due to poor room conditions, bad smell, and overall lack of cleanliness. The rooms were nothing like the photos—worn out, dirty, and completely below Hilton standards.

The bed was uncomfortable, the air conditioner kept shutting off by itself, and when I requested housekeeping, they left the cleaning materials behind in my room, which was careless and unprofessional. The internet service was down for several days, which made things worse.

The breakfast experience was a disaster. On the first day, a large group overwhelmed the hotel, and it was clear that the staff and management were not equipped to handle the crowd. Food was poorly prepared, and the breakfast staff were rude. When I asked for an omelette, the staff member responded rudely and ended up burning it.

A manager later offered me a free stay as compensation, which I declined as the issues are systemic and not something a return stay would fix. She then promised a 50% refund, but I have still not received it.

This was one of the worst hotel experiences I’ve had, and I would not recommend this property to anyone. Hilton should seriously reconsider the management and quality control at this location.

I just hope that I can upload more pictures so that everyone can see it and book their holiday elsewhere.

Misleading Room Photos: The actual rooms looked nothing like the photos online.

Poor Room Conditions: Smelly rooms, dirty surfaces, and visible dust.

Uncomfortable Bed: The mattress was in poor condition and not comfortable.

Faulty Air Conditioning: The A/C kept turning off by itself.

Unprofessional Housekeeping: Cleaning staff left their materials behind in the room.

Internet Outage: Wi-Fi was unavailable for several days.

reviews.title: VERY BAD AND NOT WORTH TO STAY HERE
reviews.positives: Nothing except the lobby looks good
reviews.negatives:
They charged RM5 for cutlery. And they took away after we paid, we can only use for one day. On the second day, we called for the cutlery return but we didn’t receive.
The towel has stain.
Their service is super bad, never pick up call and never help us to deliver food to the room.
I requested for flower delivery to the room, they also didn’t help.
I requested not to have the last room, they give us the first room.
I requested for my girl friend’s birthday but nothing has been done, not even a single happy birthday message.
The electrical plug in the room was loosen, light cover was not in good condition.
After all these, I requested for a room change, but they don’t allow.
I regret not taking all these photos and show the proofs here to let everyone knows.

reviews.title: The worst hotel
reviews.text: The hotel has a lot of rooms but the parking lots are very limited which can’t even accommodate half of the guests based on the number of rooms available. The guard of the parking is horrible! Rude! Shouting! The room is not clean either, full of sand. The towel in the still has blood stains. It is horrible experience of hotel stay in Penang!!
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives:
No proper room allocation. Gave me some other pccupants room. Just imagine my predication and embaresmemt when i was strugeling to open the room door whit all my luggage a stranger lady open the door from inside to brush me off telling that that room belongs to her? It was  already 11pm and i was totally drined down.
To add furthe to my anguish there were No hotel phone numbers in the card holder or any other documents given at the reception
 Well not to mention that i was not given an invoice neither receipt for my full payment upon check in.
After about 15 mins the front desk receptionist came with another room key informing me that there was i mistake!
That did not make sense in the computer world.
Imagine amking me look like a crook trying to break into someone else room!
The dury manager is of no assistance for she further ridicule me by apparenly trying to make it up with giving me 'something'. I sense insincerity in her approach.
They could have repair the situation.
I will never recomend this place to anyone.

reviews.text: It really makes me upset because my wife bag were stolen during breakfast at hotel cafe !!! STOLEN by stranger who is not even stay at hotel ! I wonder how can this 5 star hotel can easily access stranger into hotel area ! Means stranger can access to room also ?!!! Definitely not going back to hotel !

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.positives: Nothing.
reviews.negatives: 1. The welcome cookies were bad. They were too dry. Not enough chocolate. Not soft and moist on the inside. Texture was flaky and dry. 2. The rooms had a musty smell. Mould was growing everywhere, even on the table lamps. 3. Beds were too soft. Did not get a good night's sleep. 4. Breakfast room was too small and crowded. Food was poor. 5. Location was misleading. Not "beach front" as advertised. 6. Staff was not friendly.  7. Bad ventilation in the common areas. No aircon in the lifts. 8. TV channels were very limited or not available. 9. Overpriced. 10. Overall, the hotel is old and outdated. Time for a major revamp. With other hotels being built in Penang and Batu Ferringhi, how are you going to compete?. 11. Very, very disappointing for a Hilton brand. We stayed at other Double Tree properties before. This one is the worst. Won't be coming back.

reviews.title: The worst we have stayed
reviews.positives:
Nothing , when we checked in to our room , it was smelling of urine and the toilet was not cleaned properly and the comode had left over which had not been flushed and cleaned. the carpets were full off stains of red.

The breakfast was average and by 9am the refills were not their in most items , the staff was not refiling and  was not friendly at all. Pool is very average for a resort very small compared to other resorts in the area . the play area is for small kids of around 4-5 years .
reviews.negatives:
Everything the worst hotel stay for 30 years of travel  and not to a standard of Hilton .

when we checked in to our room , it was smelling of urine and the toilet was not cleaned properly and the comode had left over which had not been flushed and cleaned. the carpets were full off stains of red.

The breakfast was average and by 9am the refills were not their in most items , the staff was not refiling and  was not friendly at all. We booked half board basis and on the first night Saturday Buffet  we went for dinner at 8.45pm to 9pm and most of food items were not available including the action stations . On Sunday when we went early at around 7pm the staff said no buffet and have alacarte when we check the kids menu was very basic we had to complain to Duty Manager who instructed the F&B staff . We informed that we were never told that their was no buffet then a staff who was very rude said you need to read the outside board and when we checked that board it only had a promotion for Saturday buffet but have not mentioned anything that other days were Alacarte. 

Pool is very average for a resort very small compared to other resorts in the area . the play area is for small kids of around 4-5 years . 

We wanted to extend but with the 2 days of worst experience we have encountered , we booked at Royal Park resort Penang which was like heaven and you cannot compare to Hilton Double tree.

They also charge 3 MYR per day for guest parking which generally in all the hotels for in house guests is never charged. Not sure if Hilton is so cheap to charge MYR 3 for guest parking where as at Park Royal its free. 

The beach access is to a common beach and full off liter .

This hotel brings down the Hilton brand name and experience we have had in other Hiltons world wide.

reviews.title: 5 star hotel need to room guest to pay parking
reviews.text:
Book 2 night on doubletree Hilton Penang
This hotel got own parking building, but 2 night hotel also will collect parking fee from room guest. As a 5 star hotel should included parking fee for your room guest vehicle.
Even shoplot budget hotel also will help guest pay parking avoid saman.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.negatives:
The service was horrible. Buffet breakfast was a nightmare. Coffee tea not being offered, certain food counter food not refill  9am. Leaving you at a dirty table, we have to look for baby chair ourselves while carrying our toddler. Been to this hotel multiple times (average 2 to 3 times a year) 

A major let down. Not to mention the dirty sheets while we check in. Have to request for a bed sheet change.

reviews.title: Bad Experience
reviews.text: The staff was quite rude overall especially the front desk staff name Shanti which failed to cater to our request eg. we asked for the a higher level room (bare in mind we arrived just a little after 3pm) and she lied about the room being near lift. I stayed for 2 nights and when asked to make up the room, the housekeeper did not provide extra toiletries which i asked, no floor mat replaced, the comforter was still inside out (even after i told to change it). The amenities such as toilet bowl was not function well. Overall what i booked online was not as what i received. Furthermore very bad hospitality, not what i expected in a 4 star hotel, will not repeat stay at this hotel.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Totally not worth it to stay there.
reviews.positives: Strategic location.
reviews.negatives: Poor management. Cleanliness. Poor respond team.

reviews.title: Worthless hotel ever
reviews.text:
Car park is under third party,we need to park our car at the roadside.

When the time we checked-in,your staff told me breakfast buffet is Rm40 per pax,after a day when we went to the front desk and request about our breakfast,your staff told me is Rm58,because we have no booking earlier a day, so the price is increased! Well, I wonder if why your staff didn’t tell me about it when the time we checked-in?!

And yet,how can your front desk got no staff when we are there?is that a good  service should have on a 4 stars hotel?

Room service 
Anything we need for room requires that we need to SMS by OUR OWN!
The room inbuilt phone call to reception got no one answer,that’s the funny thing I had never met,Ridiculous!

Room service
Can call for room service,
however,that’s only mini bar menu inside the room,I didn’t see your dining menu in the room of any single corner,or I wonder if for the menu I need to SMS to REQUEST as well ?

Breakfast buffet 
About the price, I had mentioned on top 

For your foods and selections, I understand that because due to COVID-19 case,you has made up the mind change your type to à la cart instead of buffet type restaurant,no problem, I admire that you did 

But please,if you want to avoid of the case
You should control the crowd and not keep letting the guests walk in to the restaurant and make the whole room because super crowded.

For the food sections,since you wanna do á la cart service,can you please put a menu before the section and make it clear for every guest and show what do you have?

We need to queue till the bar and ask your staff about what do you actually having down there,are all of your guests like a prisoner can I ask ? We queued for food?

Just because I need to queue for food,the food I collected from the first stall and I need to queue again for the second stall,So I need to put down my food on my table and then I gonna left the table and queue again wasn’t I?

My food was EATEN BY A CROW!
That’s made me angry,don’t te
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.positives: the room is clean

reviews.title: A terrible hotel with Incompetent General Manager. Worst Hotel stay of the Year
reviews.positives: The general waiters in the restaurant and lounge are actually not bad they are very kind and try to do their best. Concierges are lazy - In general when they see guest arriving ask if you need a hand with luggage. I mean what happened to just be doing your job when you a taxi offloading a guest with Bags why does one need to ask.  Had a Chat with the General Manager Ms. Chan - Does not to have a clue to what happening in the hotel as after staying for 5 days she ask me if they can do something during the verbal feedback -after already checking out and departing for the Airport- Things then make sense a general lack of leadership and direction - (Clueless)
reviews.negatives: Over all cleanliness of the hotel is poor. there is dust and debris everywhere. Definitely not a Hilton branded hotel as the name suggest as the Managers have zero standards of caring and courtesy.  The breakfast tables are dirty not cleaned properly - Gym is dirty with no one cleaning after morning bins full of use paper.  Pool is the same quite dirty and not well maintained.  Room are decent size but old and moldy. Hot food on the buffet is luke warm or cold, when you mention this to the staff they just smile. quality of ingredients poor. Donk be fooled with the Hilton brand this is not a Hilton branded hotel for sure. Booking. Com should not be advertising the place as a 4 star hotel its more like 1 star.

reviews.title: Highly not recommended
reviews.text:
No need to choose this hotel, there are better options, The sea view room ordered is not a sea view at all.
And also need to pay RM3 parking fee, it does not matter, the next morning I went out to buy breakfast, came back to charge me once more RM3, I just check in in the afternoon, only after more than 10 hours, just go out in the next day morning and then come in to pay again
reviews.room_type: King Suite with Sea View and Balcony

reviews.title: Swimming pool dirty..and also breakfast very poor
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Hilton Double Tree's breakfast and hotel room
reviews.text: During my stay last two weeks with my wife, I found out the room was smelly and this maybe high occupancy and the fast housekeeping poor job of getting the bad odour out. Moreover the breakfast was a disappointment, can you imaging the Nasi Lemak chicken sambal meat was raw! When I question this to the staff, he went to the kitchen and MIA (missing in Action for his rest of his life) I told this to the front office they took my business card and never return call.  I'm a penangnite and my experience was worst how about foreigners will feel, pity them. So Double tree, please double up your food and stay. Thank you with disappointment.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: DUSTY, MUSTY SMELLING BEDS & ROOMS
reviews.text:
We checked in to a dusty room which had a very strong smell which was a mixture of the corridor and the rooms smell. 

The whole corridor had a very strong paint like smell and the room beside us had a very bad smell emitting from it(we were the 2nd last room on the floor)

There was algae at the pipe at the balcony of our room(618). After complaining, the hotel told us to change our room.

The new room 1008 was dusty as well. The matress has very very bad musty smell. However due to we had to attend a wedding the next day,we had to just bare it and sleep. 

This is not something we are supposed to go through in such an esteemed hotel.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Very dirty and old
reviews.text: First they put us in a smelly room 417. I requested to change room. After about an hour, no action from the receptionist. They only take action after my second call. This property do not look like Hilton. Very bad, old and dirty.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Poor room service, dirty room, staff not responsive
reviews.text: The room is dirty. When checked in, shower gel, shampoo and conditioner all empty. When asked to clean the room again and refill the shower gel, no response at all for 30 mins. Multiple calls made but no response at all. Had to go to check in counter to get it myself. Speak to the manager, but complains were not taken seriously.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Don’t bother
reviews.text: Very busy , no service , both got sick from food , no help from staff , was new year couldn’t get a taxi or grab anywhere , really bad experience
reviews.room_type: King Accessible Room

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Best
reviews.room_type: Twin Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Not well maintained during peak season
reviews.text: We stayed during school holiday period, the hotel was crowded, guests at pool are not following the required swimming attire to use the pool. The corridor carpet are all damp and wet due to guests using pool not drying themselves while entering the hotel. The furniture are outdates and there is a unpleasant smell during the stay. Overall I will not be staying this hotel again due to this unpleasant experience, given that this is a well known hotel.
reviews.room_type: Twin Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: First and maybe last
reviews.text:
Register Room at around 11am and went to outside attractions and mentioned will come back at around 6pm. after checkin in around 8pm we found that the following things happened which I think only will happen in 1 or 2 star hotels. 

1. Several pieces of hair found on sofa bed
2. No towels in bathroom, mentioned that will get by 9pm but only got the towels at around 10pm. We as adult are fine but our children are sweaty and dirty after full day outside, only can start to take bath at around 10pm after got the towels. This is only happened after several walk down to reception and phone reminder to careline. And lastly met a staff named Jeffery (the only good staff I met lol)  at the corridor and he had put my requests in a company WhatsApp group, and the process is faster which finally we got the towels. 
3. Sofa bed not setup even informed to the reception during register at 11am, setup at around 10pm only.
4. No rubbish bag was found in the dustbin, is it normal for doubletree, I don’t know. 

The whole holiday mood of spoilt. That’s it.
reviews.room_type: Twin Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: This resort overpriced and not 5 stars standard.
reviews.text: This resort below 5 stars standard. Overpriced. We need to pay RM3 per day even you stay in this hotel. Car park very dirty. This don’t sounds like 5 stars standard. Room & toilet renovation just like 3 stars apartment, quite old building. All below expectations.

reviews.text: It is on isolated island with almost no activities outside, all things are expensive in hotel than outside. Breakfast is also not that good

reviews.title: Doesn't live up to Hilton standards
reviews.text: Hotel showed signs of aging, but that's alright. Staff's service could be better. For example, the teh tarik that breakfast staff promised to make for me didn't come to my table, despite thinning crowds that day. Cleaner moved their mop towards guests at the lobby area, seemingly implying to tell them to move away so that she could do her job. Saw one housekeeping staff remained in the room after cleaning up, to use his phone (sounds like having a video call). Swimming pool is very dirty, with strips of white tissue at the bottom of the pool. Many of the lights in the pool also came off. Seriously in need of an overhaul, particularly staff service.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad service level and room condition
reviews.text:
During our stay at DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Penang, we have received a very bad service from the front office staff on duty and the room condition is not suitable for guest stay.

When we feedback to the front office that major part of the floor area within the room is wet, we was treated very badly by the front office staff on duty instead of providing the solution.

We request to meet the GM, but only the Duty Manager is available to meet us to attend for the issue that we faced.

For 5 star hotel, the service level need to be commensurate with the 5 star as well, but we have just received not even 1 star service level.
reviews.room_type: King Deluxe Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad experience

2.No parking reserved for hotel guest due to having dinner event. And additional parking fee for hotel guest.
3. When booking they told us seaview room but when we checked in the room was partialy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Regarding this stay, I am very disappointed as none of my expectations were met. Before our arrival, the hotel informed us of a complimentary room upgrade due to some incorrect information at the time of booking. However, upon arrival, we were given our originally booked room. When I inquired about the upgrade, they explained that it was dependent on availability.

Despite receiving a confirmation email , the hotel mentioned they could revert to the original booking. They checked the availability of the upgraded room and informed us it would take 45 minutes to prepare due to cleaning and curtain replacement, or we could check into the original room immediately. We agreed to wait.

After more than an hour, we finally accessed the upgraded room, only to find it still dirty. The curtains and sofa were stained, the extra bed had dirty sheets and pillows, the mirror was smudged, the air conditioning was inefficient and noisy, and the bathroom sink had drainage issues. The room also had an unpleasant odor.

Overall, my experience at this four-star hotel was extremely unsatisfactory.
reviews.room_type: KING PREMIER SEA VIEW WITH BALCONY

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing experience. The lobby, the check-in area. All shouted "luxury". We got what we paid for. Will definitely come back IN SHA ALLAH. Room was huge spacious and super clean. Balcony view was just breath-taking, even though ours was not fully facing the sea, but still the lush green mountains in the morning were soothing for the eyes and mind. I guess those who pay extra for the sea-view get even a better one. Breakfast was fabulous, the seating area was huge with amazing ambiance and pool views. Plenty of parking.
reviews.negatives: Nothing as such I would say but one suggestion could be to use some sort of insect repellents on the walls of the balcony outside as there were few insects and lizard there on the walls ( which is understandable , given we are surrounded by so much nature). But for some like me who have phobias , it could be better as we wanted to spend more time on the balcony but couldn't when these showed up Just FYI, nothing was inside the room, just the outer walls of the balcony.

reviews.title: A great place for an escape.
reviews.positives:
Great hotel with wonderful staff. At check in, we had excellent assistance from Mohd Faizal Bin Elias and the pleasant head of housekeeping (whose name I cannot remember). We looked forward to breakfast each morning and the fantastic people working there; Kumar was exceptional. Even the housekeeping staff on the tenth floor was good; Rafin Molla was friendly, efficient and polite.
I went to the gym many times and enjoyed working out in a room with a great view.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
Honestly, I’m extremely disappointed with my experience.

First of all, I arrived quite late in the evening, around 5:40 PM, and had to stand at the counter waiting for a very long time. There was no receptionist or staff assisting guests, and it took forever just for the staff to finish serving one customer. I was literally standing there the whole time with no greeting, no smile, and no effort from the staff to help at all. The queue kept getting longer and longer. Not even water was offered while waiting.

What frustrated me the most was that I still couldn’t check in because apparently the room was not ready yet. Check-in is supposed to be at 3 PM, right? That’s completely unfair to customers, especially considering check-out is already at 11 AM. Why not hire more staff to speed up the process? The hotel is expensive enough already.

The staff told me the room would be ready in 20 minutes. I then requested a late check-out, but they refused and instead offered a free buffet dinner as compensation, which I accepted. But after waiting 20 minutes, the room was STILL not ready. And so casually, without even looking apologetic or concerned, the staff told me to wait another 20 minutes. No sense of urgency whatsoever.

In the end, I only got into my room around 8 PM. Imagine being left waiting for over 2 hours without proper handling or sincere apologies. I had to push the staff repeatedly just to finally get a late check-out, and even then they only extended it until 2:30 PM. Completely nonsense.

Another thing I’m unhappy about is the parking design. The sharp bumper/ramp setup for going up and down is ridiculous. My car got scraped badly, and I noticed there were already many scrape marks there from previous cars too. Seriously, who thought that design was a good idea?

Now, to be fair — the room itself was very comfortable, and I genuinely liked that part. However, for anyone taking the mountain view room… honestly, the view is terrible. It doesn’t even feel like a proper mountain view at all. And personally, I also felt there was very little privacy because from the corridor you can easily see neighboring rooms and guests.
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM HIGH FLOOR WITH BALCONY

The pool facilities are great if you have a young child. The staff are very friendly and kind and accommodating. It was a very pleasant day and a very comfortable stay for our trip.
reviews.negatives: They need to do something about the magpies around the pool area! The location is good but due to the traffic it’s not great when you want to leave the hotel. A 2 km ride can take 30 to 40 minutes.

reviews.title: Bouquets by the Sea: A Valentine’s Reverie at DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Penang 🌹🌊
reviews.positives:
Ah, DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Penang — that seaside haven where the air tastes faintly of salt and warm cookies (culinary diplomacy, perfected). We returned to our room one evening, sun-tired and unsuspecting, only to find elegant, rose bouquets resting regally upon the bed, composed and intentional, like love letters bound in petals. 

The stay itself was a lullaby in resort form: warm cookies at check-in (culinary diplomacy at its finest), sea-kissed views, rooms that breathe comfort, and staff whose kindness feels unforced and sincere. But those roses — ah, those roses — transformed comfort into memory. Not just a hotel stay, but a chapter. 🌹🍪🌊 #PetalsAndPillows
reviews.negatives: Nil

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.text:
We had a very good stay at DoubleTree by Hilton Penang. We stayed in the 2-Bedroom Family Suite with Sea View and Terrace, and the room was extremely spacious, comfortable, and perfect for a family vacation.
The sea view was amazing, especially from a higher floor, which I would highly recommend. The breakfast buffet offered a wide variety of choices, and everything was well prepared. The customer service was excellent throughout our stay, with friendly and helpful staff. Parking was also convenient, with plenty of spaces available.
The only downside is that the hotel does not have a private beach. However, there is a pedestrian bridge (jejantas) that provides easy access to the nearby Miami Beach, which is just a short walk away.
Overall, it was a wonderful stay, and I would definitely recommend this hotel to families looking for a comfortable and relaxing getaway in Penang.
reviews.room_type: 2-BEDROOM FAMILY SUITE W/ SEAVIEW AND TERRACE
